title: Union-Find — Connected Components
description: Given n nodes and m undirected edges, determine how many connected components the graph has.
inputSpec: First line: n and m. Next m lines: u v (undirected edge).

botCodes.code:
n,m=map(int,input().split())
p=list(range(n))
def find(x):
    while p[x]!=x:p[x]=p[p[x]];x=p[x]
    return x
for _ in range(m):
    u,v=map(int,input().split())
    pu,pv=find(u),find(v)
    if pu!=pv:p[pu]=pv
print(sum(1 for i in range(n) if find(i)==i))
